Enum Class category

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<category>
models.category
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<category>, Constable
public enum category extends Enum<category>
Represents the available expense categories in the system. Each category has an id and a display name.

    • values

      public static category[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static category valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the category id.
      Returns:

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns the display name of the category.
      Returns:
      category display name

    • fromId

      public static category fromId(int id)
      Returns a category matching the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - category identifier
      Returns:
      matching category, or OTHER if not found

    • fromName

      public static category fromName(String name)
      Returns a category matching the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - category name
      Returns:
      matching category, or OTHER if not found

      public String toString()
      Returns the display name of the category.
